tasks.label: HFT Pipeline: Compile Target Matrix
tasks.detail: Triggers the full, optimized C++23 CMake multi-app build matrix.

tasks.label: HFT Pipeline: Run Micro-Benchmark
tasks.detail: Executes the nanosecond allocator benchmark driver.

tasks.label: HFT Pipeline: Run Baseline Overhead Floor
tasks.detail: Runs the pure overhead baseline simulation.

tasks.label: HFT Pipeline: Run CME SBE Decoder Demo
tasks.detail: Runs the true multi-threaded CME SBE decoder sandbox.

tasks.label: HFT Pipeline: Execute GoogleTest Suite
tasks.detail: Executes all boundary and alignment validation test tracks.
